task_completion.description: Verify that a new survey titled 'Youth Development Study - Wave 2' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the survey title 'Youth Development Study - Wave 2' in the LimeSurvey top navigation bar, survey list, or survey settings page.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Baseline Demographics' question group has been excluded or deleted from the Wave 2 survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the survey structure/group list on the left sidebar. The group 'Baseline Demographics' should NOT be visible in the list of question groups for the Wave 2 survey.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'School Experience' and 'Family Context' groups are present in the Wave 2 survey.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the survey structure/group list on the left sidebar. Both 'School Experience' and 'Family Context' must be visible as question groups.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new question group named 'Recent Changes' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the survey structure/group list on the left sidebar. A group named 'Recent Changes' must be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify that a question with the code 'moved' and correct text has been added to the 'Recent Changes' group.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question editor or summary screen showing the question code 'moved' and the text 'Have you moved to a different home in the past 12 months?' inside the 'Recent Changes' group.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'moved' question is set to the 'Yes/No' question type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the question settings or type selector for the 'moved' question. The selected question type should be 'Yes/No' (or type 'Y').

task_completion.description: Verify that the Wave 2 survey has been activated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the survey summary or top toolbar. The survey status should indicate it is active (e.g., a green 'Active' badge, a 'Stop this survey' button instead of 'Activate this survey', or a checkmark under the active column in the survey list).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web browser to interact with LimeSurvey.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser (like Chromium/Firefox) navigating the LimeSurvey admin interface, not a text editor or script.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like 'curl' or python/php scripts interacting with the LimeSurvey RPC API to create the survey.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not directly edit the database to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: No database management tools (e.g., sqlite3 CLI, phpMyAdmin) should be visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected survey title is 'Youth Development Study - Wave 2'. The 'Baseline Demographics' group must NOT be present in the new survey. The 'School Experience' and 'Family Context' groups must be present (including the 'gpa' question). A new group named 'Recent Changes' must be present, containing a Yes/No question (type 'Y') with the code 'moved' and text 'Have you moved to a different home in the past 12 months?'. The survey must be activated.
